structured.title: Family Plans Around Church Duties
structured.overview: The conversation centers on family logistics and church commitments. One speaker tells Reese to do whatever he wants for the time being, while noting that if the boys end up seeing mum, they will simply carry on independently. The discussion then shifts to a headache that is making things difficult, with a suggestion to play guitar if needed. Finally, the speaker mentions praying for daddy, who has a bad headache but is still supposed to preach at church this morning and at another church in the afternoon up in the valleys.

events.title: Daddy Preaches At Church This Morning
events.description: Daddy is scheduled to preach at church this morning despite having a bad headache.

events.title: Daddy Preaches At Another Church In Valleys
events.description: Daddy is scheduled to preach at another church in the afternoon up in the valleys.
